name: golang-github-beorn7-perks-dev
title: golang-github-beorn7-perks-dev
description:
effective computation of things
This is a fork of github.com/bmizerany/perks (now unmaintained).
The package contains:
* github.com/beorn7/perks/histogram: a Go implementation of BigML's histogram
package for Clojure/Java.
* github.com/beorn7/perks/quantile: computes approximate quantiles over an
unbounded data stream within low memory and CPU bounds.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use golang-github-beorn7-perks-dev because effective computation of things.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use golang-github-beorn7-perks-dev as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair golang-github-beorn7-perks-dev with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `golang-github-beorn7-perks-dev --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
